messages.content: Hi can you give me the summary of the RAG
Can you give me a summary of the harry potter goblet of fire.

Certainly! "Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire" follows Harry Potter as he enters his fourth year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. This year, Hogwarts is hosting the Triwizard Tournament, a magical competition between three wizarding schools: Hogwarts, Beauxbatons, and Durmstrang. Each school selects a champion to compete in three challenging tasks designed to test their magical skills, bravery, and intelligence.

Despite being underage and not entering his name, Harry is unexpectedly chosen as a fourth champion by the Goblet of Fire, causing surprise and suspicion. Throughout the school year, Harry faces dangerous tasks, navigates complex friendships and rivalries, and uncovers a dark plot involving the return of the dark wizard Voldemort, who had been thought nearly destroyed when Harry was a baby.

The story combines elements of magical adventure, mystery, and the challenges of growing up, culminating in a dramatic confrontation that signals the return of Voldemort and sets the stage for the conflicts to come. Harry's courage and determination are central as he faces mortal danger and the responsibilities of his unique destiny [source context].
